Off Calendar Mar-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. ANDREW CHEW OF BRAYTON & PURCELL, LLP, TEL. NO. 898-1555 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MOJEED O. SALAAM OF THE LAW FIRM OF LEWIS, BRISBOIS, BISGAARD & SMITH LLP, TEL. NO. 438-5926 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED; PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH HIS DECLARATION. DEFENDANT IS CAUTIONED TO COMPLY WITH C R C 3.1110 (E) AND (F) AND 3.1350(G). Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(G). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/ER
